ipBlockInformationSubtitle: This section allows you to customize the public information about your IP block (information present in the whois database).
ipBlockInformationOrganisationOnGoingCha: The organization of the IP block is being reassigned. Please wait a few minutes.
ipBlockInformationUpdateSuccessMessage: The information for the IP block {{ip}} has been updated.
ipBlockInformationUpdateErrorMessage: An error occurred while updating the information for the IP block {{ip}}: {{error}}
ipBlockInformationOrgUpdateSuccessMessag: The IP block {{ip}} is being assigned to the organization {{organisation}}. This operation may take a few minutes
ipBlockInformationOrgUpdateErrorMessage: An error occurred while assigning the IP block {{ip}} to the organization {{organisation}}: {{error}}
